name: Navicore Solutions- Peoria, Il
description_short: Non-profit credit counseling agency with 30 years of experience offering debt management plans, housing assistance, and financial guidance to consumers nationwide.
description_long:
Navicore Solutions is a nonprofit credit counseling organization based in Peoria, Illinois that has been operating for 30 years. The organization is accredited by recognized financial counseling bodies and employs certified counselors to serve consumers across the United States. Their mission centers on helping individuals achieve financial stability and become debt-free through professional guidance and structured financial planning.

Navicore offers comprehensive counseling services across multiple financial challenges including credit and debt management, housing and foreclosure prevention, student loan navigation, bankruptcy counseling, and disaster recovery assistance. Their flagship service is the Debt Management Plan (DMP), which combines personalized credit counseling with structured repayment arrangements designed to help consumers pay off unsecured debt in less than five years. They also provide certified pre-bankruptcy counseling and education, housing counseling for homeowners facing foreclosure, and specialized support for military members and veterans.

The organization distinguishes itself through its nonprofit status, 30-year track record, certified counselor network, and multi-language support (offering Spanish-language services). They serve a nationwide client base and maintain an office location system. Their website includes educational resources including blog posts, a podcast, video library, and learning center to support financial literacy beyond direct counseling sessions.

As a nonprofit credit counseling agency, Navicore Solutions operates within the free-help category. However, consumers should understand that while initial consultations and credit counseling are free, their Debt Management Plans involve structured repayment arrangements that may include fees or creditor concessions. The organization's effectiveness depends on client commitment to the counseling process and adherence to personalized financial plans.
pros: Nonprofit organization with 30+ years of established experience and track record
Certified counselors across multiple specializations (credit, bankruptcy, housing, student loans)
Debt Management Plans reportedly help consumers become debt-free years faster
Serves nationwide client base with multiple office locations
Specialized services for military members and veterans
Comprehensive educational resources including blog, podcast, video library, and learning center
Accredited by recognized financial counseling organizations
cons: Debt Management Plans, while structured, still require creditor cooperation and may take up to 5 years to complete
Limited specific information on website about counselor qualifications, response times, or success rates beyond one client testimonial
No transparency on potential costs or fees associated with Debt Management Plans
Website does not clearly explain the difference between free counseling sessions and paid DMP services
Limited details on disaster recovery services despite prominently featuring this service
best_for: Consumers with multiple debts seeking structured repayment plans without debt settlement or consolidation loans
Homeowners facing foreclosure or seeking housing counseling and mortgage assistance
Military members and veterans needing financial guidance and specialized resources
Individuals considering bankruptcy who need certified pre-bankruptcy counseling and education
diagnosis: Navicore Solutions is best for consumers seeking nonprofit, certified credit counseling and structured debt management without taking new loans or settling debts for less. The main caveat is that while credit counseling may be free, their Debt Management Plans involve fees and creditor negotiations that require 3-5 year commitments, and success depends entirely on client adherence and creditor participation.
services: Personal credit and debt counseling from certified counselors
Debt Management Plans (DMP) for unsecured debt repayment
Student loan repayment navigation and forgiveness program guidance
Disaster recovery counseling and resource connection
Financial literacy education and learning resources
Military and veteran-specific financial resources and counseling
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
